title: leucanthemopsis cuneata
intro: Leucanthemopsis cuneata, also known as Alpine Daisy or Alpine Cress, is a small perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Leucanthemopsis cuneata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used to support digestive and respiratory health.
